maps.title: One Block
maps.shortDescription: Classic one block adventure

maps.title: Lucky One Block
maps.shortDescription: Random lucky loot every block

maps.title: Giant One Block
maps.shortDescription: One block challenge but every block is giant-sized

maps.title: Ocean One Block
maps.shortDescription: Start on a single block surrounded by endless ocean

maps.title: Hardcore One Block
maps.shortDescription: No respawns – one life in the toughest one block challenge

maps.title: Void One Block
maps.shortDescription: Pure void survival – only one regenerating block and nothing else

maps.title: One Block Revenge
maps.shortDescription: Boss fights and intense combat in the one block world

maps.title: Classic SkyBlock
maps.shortDescription: Tiny floating island start with limited resources

maps.title: Hardcore SkyBlock
maps.shortDescription: Extreme sky survival with no respawns

maps.title: Nether SkyBlock
maps.shortDescription: Sky island challenge starting in the Nether dimension

maps.title: Lucky Block Sky
maps.shortDescription: Lucky blocks floating high in the sky with crazy surprises

maps.title: Lucky Block Flat
maps.shortDescription: Infinite flat world filled with random lucky blocks

maps.title: Lucky Block One Block
maps.shortDescription: One block world where every block is a lucky block

maps.title: One Chunk Survival
maps.shortDescription: Survive using only one chunk of the world – extreme resource limit

maps.title: Cave Survival
maps.shortDescription: Start and survive trapped inside a single cave forever

maps.title: Ultra Hardcore Island
maps.shortDescription: No natural health regen – survive on a tiny island in hardcore mode

maps.title: Aqua Parkour
maps.shortDescription: Water-themed parkour with jumps, slides, and aquatic obstacles

maps.title: Tower Parkour
maps.shortDescription: Climb the massive tower with precision jumps and high falls

maps.title: Only Up Suspense
maps.shortDescription: A thrilling vertical parkour adventure – climb high into the sky and don't look down!

maps.title: SERP Pokedrock Addon
maps.shortDescription: Catch, train, and battle Pokémon directly inside your survival world with custom models and animations!

maps.title: Lucky Blocks Chunk Challenge
maps.shortDescription: Build your way from chunk to chunk and explore the skies with crazy lucky block surprises!

maps.title: Lucky Block Race
maps.shortDescription: Break the blocks for random item drops and race your friends to the finish line. Supports 4 players!

maps.title: Modern House Starter World
maps.shortDescription: Skip the grinding and start your survival inside a sleek, fully furnished luxury modern mansion!

maps.title: Project Dropper OG
maps.shortDescription: Bring back the nostalgic feelings of classic Minecraft with this ultimate freefall obstacle challenge.

maps.title: One Chunk: 100 Random Layers
maps.shortDescription: A unique survival challenge where every layer you mine down reveals a completely randomized structure layer.

maps.title: One Piece (Anime)
maps.shortDescription: Set sail across the grand line! Master Haki, consume legendary Devil Fruits, and battle iconic pirates in your survival world.

maps.title: The Ultimate Morph 2.0
maps.shortDescription: Transform into any mob or anime entity you defeat! Gain their unique abilities, health points, and combat traits.

maps.title: The Waifus Party
maps.shortDescription: Bring your favorite characters into your world! Interact, team up, and build the ultimate squad to join your survival adventures.

maps.title: Anime Box Addon
maps.shortDescription: Unbox massive power-ups! Features a lucky crate system packed with mythical gear and elements from various hit anime universes.

maps.title: One Punch Man Addon
maps.shortDescription: Become Saitama and obliterate hostile entities with a single punch. Includes Genos gear and custom combat animations.
